title: 10 best herbal essential oils for menopause
intro_desc: Herbal essential oils for menopause are plant-based extracts used to alleviate symptoms associated with this natural life stage. They help by reducing hot flashes, mood swings, and sleep disturbances, promoting overall well-being. The best herbal essential oils for menopause include Cimicifuga racemosa, Vitex agnus-castus, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Angelica archangelica, Valeriana officinalis, Zingiber officinale, Trifolium pratense, Avena sativa, Hypericum perforatum, and Melissa officinalis. If left untreated, menopause symptoms can negatively impact daily life, causing stress, anxiety, and decreased quality of life, ultimately affecting relationships, work, and overall health.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian essential oils helps with menopause because it provides a natural solution to alleviate hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings. The oil's sedative properties can also help regulate sleep patterns, which are often disrupted during this phase of life. Additionally, valerian essential oil has anti-inflammatory properties that may reduce joint pain and stiffness commonly experienced during menopause. By using valerian essential oils in aromatherapy, women can promote relaxation, reduce stress, and find relief from menopausal symptoms.
remedy_properties: Sedative property: Valerian essential oil has sedative properties that can help alleviate hot flashes, night sweats, and insomnia associated with menopause, promoting a restful sleep.

Antioxidant property: Valerian essential oil is rich in antioxidants that can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to symptoms such as mood swings, anxiety, and depression during menopause.

Muscle relaxant property: Valerian essential oil has muscle-relaxing properties that can help alleviate joint pain, cramps, and spasms commonly experienced during menopause, promoting overall relaxation and comfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in sesquiterpenes, which help to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, making them ideal for alleviating hot flashes and night sweats associated with menopause.
Rhizomes: Contain a high concentration of valerenic acid, which has a sedative effect and helps to regulate hormonal imbalance, reducing symptoms of mood swings and insomnia during menopause.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality valeriana officinalis roots at dawn on a dry day to ensure optimal potency.
Chop 500 grams of harvested roots into small pieces and dry them in a warm oven at 60°c for 24 hours.
Steam distill the dried root pieces using 1000 milliliters of water and a clevenger apparatus for 4 hours and 30 minutes.
Filter the resulting essential oil through a paper coffee filter into dark glass bottles, discarding any impurities.
Store the final valeriana officinalis essential oil in a cool, dark place for up to 6 months or use immediately after preparation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm essential oils helps with menopause because they offer a natural and gentle way to alleviate symptoms. The herb's calming properties can soothe hot flashes, night sweats, and restlessness, promoting a sense of relaxation and tranquility. Additionally, lemon balm's mild sedative effects can help regulate sleep patterns and reduce anxiety, common complaints during this life stage. By incorporating lemon balm essential oils into daily routines, women can find relief from the discomforts of menopause and enjoy a smoother transition through this significant change.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Lemon balm essential oil's antioxidant properties help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can alleviate symptoms such as hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings associated with menopause.

Anxiolytic and calming effects: The anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) and calming effects of lemon balm essential oil can help to soothe anxiety, insomnia, and irritability commonly experienced during menopause.

Uterine-relaxing properties: Lemon balm essential oil's uterine-relaxing properties can help to alleviate menstrual cramps, bloating, and other pelvic discomforts associated with menopause by reducing uterine spasms and tension.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, roots help to soothe hot flashes and night sweats associated with menopause.
Flowers: Containing high levels of citral and geraniol, flowers promote relaxation and reduce anxiety symptoms commonly experienced during menopause.
remedy_recipe: Harvest melissa officinalis leaves at dawn when dew is still present for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested leaves in a well-ventilated area or using a food dehydrator at low heat for 2 hours.
Steam distill 10 grams of dried melissa officinalis leaves with 100 ml of distilled water for 1 hour.
Collect and filter the resulting essential oil through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass bottle.
Store the extracted essential oil in a dark glass bottle with a tight lid, refrigerated at 4°c for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile essential oils helps with menopause because of its soothing and calming properties that can ease hot flashes, mood swings, and insomnia common during this stage. The oil's anti-inflammatory compounds also alleviate vaginal dryness and discomfort associated with hormone fluctuations. Additionally, chamomile's sedative effects promote relaxation, reducing anxiety and promoting a restful night's sleep, allowing women to better cope with the physical and emotional changes of menopause.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Chamomile oil has anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate hot flashes and night sweats commonly experienced during menopause.
Antioxidant property: As an antioxidant, chamomile oil helps protect the body from oxidative stress, which can contribute to menopausal symptoms such as joint pain and fatigue.

Anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) property: Chamomile oil has a calming effect on the mind and body, making it effective in reducing anxiety, mood swings, and irritability often associated with menopause.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in apigenin and other bioactive compounds that help alleviate hot flashes, anxiety, and insomnia common during menopause.
Flowers: Contain anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that soothe vaginal dryness, itching, and burning sensations experienced by many women during menopause.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality fresh or dried matricaria chamomilla flowers in late morning for maximum oil yield.
Dry the harvested flowers using a food dehydrator set at 40°c for 24 hours to preserve their potency.
Combine one part of dried flowers with three parts of carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil in a clean glass jar.
Steep the mixture in a cool dark place for 14 days, shaking the jar daily to facilitate oil extraction and infusion.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth into another container and discard the solids; store the resulting essential oil in a dark glass bottle at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Milk thistle essential oils helps with menopause because it possesses potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that soothe hormonal imbalances, alleviating symptoms such as hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings. The oil's phytoestrogens also help to rebalance estrogen levels, reducing the severity of vaginal dryness and itching. Additionally, milk thistle essential oils may support liver health, which is crucial during menopause when hormonal fluctuations can put extra stress on this vital organ.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Milk thistle essential oil helps neutralize free radicals and reduce oxidative stress, which can alleviate symptoms like hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings associated with menopause.

Hormone regulation: The essential oil's estrogen-regulating properties may help balance hormonal imbalances and alleviate symptoms like vaginal dryness, mood changes, and sleep disturbances during menopause.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Milk thistle essential oil's anti-inflammatory effects can reduce inflammation and discomfort in the body, which may alleviate symptoms like joint pain, cramps, and headaches common during menopause.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in silymarin, a powerful antioxidant that helps alleviate hot flashes and night sweats commonly experienced during menopause.
Seeds: Abundant in omega-3 fatty acids, which help reduce inflammation and promote hormonal balance, alleviating symptoms of menopause such as mood swings and joint pain.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality silybum marianum leaves and flowers at dawn on a dry day.
Dry the plant material in a well-ventilated area or using a dehydrator for 7 days.
Steam distill the dried plant material using a clevenger apparatus at 100°c for 4 hours.
Collect the essential oil and separate it from the water using a separating funnel within 30 minutes.
Filter the essential oil through a coffee filter or cheesecloth into dark glass bottles for storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lime essential oils helps with menopause because it has a calming effect on the body, reducing symptoms of hot flashes and night sweats. The citrus scent also boosts mood and energy levels, helping to alleviate feelings of anxiety and depression that are common during this stage of life. Additionally, lime oil's antispasmodic properties help to ease menstrual cramps and promote relaxation, making it a natural remedy for women going through menopause.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Herbal lime essential oil's antioxidant properties help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which are common symptoms during menopause, thus alleviating hot flashes and night sweats.

Uterine Stimulating Properties: The uterine stimulating properties of herbal lime essential oil can help regulate hormonal imbalances, reducing symptoms such as mood swings, anxiety, and depression that occur during menopause.
Anti-Anxiety and Sedative Properties: Herbal lime essential oil's anti-anxiety and sedative properties can help reduce stress, anxiety, and insomnia, common issues faced by women during menopause.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the lime plant are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, making them effective in reducing hot flashes and night sweats associated with menopause.
Barks: The barks of the lime plant have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate vaginal dryness and itching common during menopause.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh tilia x europaea flowers and leaves in the morning to ensure maximum potency.
Dry the harvested plant material using a warm air circulating dryer at 60 degrees celsius for 24 hours.
Steam distill the dried plant material using a copper still with a condenser coil and collect the essential oil.
Filter the collected essential oil through a coffee filter paper to remove any impurities or debris.
Store the filtered essential oil in dark glass bottles at room temperature away from direct sunlight for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chinese peony essential oils helps with menopause because it has been traditionally used in traditional Chinese medicine to regulate women's health, particularly during menopause. Its properties are said to ease symptoms such as hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings by balancing hormones and calming the nervous system. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties may help alleviate vaginal dryness and other physical discomforts associated with menopause. By using this oil, women can find relief from these common symptoms and regain their sense of well-being during this transition period.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: This property helps alleviate hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings associated with menopause by reducing inflammation in the body.

Estrogen-regulating property: Chinese Peony essential oil contains compounds that may help regulate estrogen levels, which can alleviate symptoms such as vaginal dryness, insomnia, and anxiety common during menopause.
Anxiolytic (anxiety-relieving) property: The oil's ability to calm the nervous system can help reduce anxiety, irritability, and mood swings often experienced during menopausal transition.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Chinese Peony contain compounds that help alleviate hot flashes and night sweats, common symptoms of menopause.
Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe vaginal dryness and irritation associated with menopause.
Seeds: Seeds are rich in estrogenic compounds that help regulate hormonal balance and alleviate symptoms such as mood swings and anxiety during menopause.
remedy_recipe: Harvest paeonia lactiflora flowers in the early morning when dew is still present on the petals ensuring maximum essential oil content.
Dry the harvested flowers using a food dehydrator at 30°c for 24 hours or air drying for 7 days to preserve quality.
Blend 100g of dried paeonia lactiflora flowers with 500ml of carrier oil such as sweet almond oil in a dark glass bottle.
Infuse the mixture in a cool dark place for 14-16 days shaking the bottle daily allowing the herbs to steep and release their oils.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into another clean dark glass bottle discarding the solids and storing the essential oil.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Angelica essential oils helps with menopause because it contains a unique blend of compounds that can alleviate symptoms such as hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings. The oil's natural estrogen-like properties help to regulate hormonal imbalances, reducing the severity of these symptoms. Additionally, angelica's anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties can soothe cramps, joint pain, and vaginal dryness, making it a natural solution for women experiencing discomfort during menopause.
remedy_properties: Anxiolytic (anti-anxiety) properties: Angelica essential oil has been shown to reduce anxiety and stress, which are common complaints during menopause, by promoting relaxation and calming the nervous system.
Estrogen-like effects: Angelica essential oil contains compounds that have estrogenic activity, which can help alleviate hot flashes and night sweats, as well as improve mood and sleep quality.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Angelica essential oil has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce joint pain and discomfort commonly experienced during menopause, as well as alleviate vaginal dryness and irritation.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the angelica plant contain bioactive compounds that help alleviate hot flashes and night sweats associated with menopause.
Rhizomes: The rhizomes, which are underground stems, have anti-inflammatory properties that can soothe hormonal imbalances and reduce symptoms of menopause.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality angelica archangelica roots and leaves from a trusted source for maximum potency.
Dry the harvested plant material in a warm and dry place for at least 7-10 days to reduce moisture content.
Chop the dried plant material into small pieces and pack it tightly into a clean glass jar or container leaving little headspace.
Steam distill the packed plant material using a steam distillation apparatus with a ratio of 1:3 water to plant material for 2-3 hours.
Filter the distilled essential oil through a coffee filter or cheesecloth and store it in a dark glass bottle at room temperature away from direct sunlight.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Monk's pepper essential oils helps with menopause because it is rich in phytochemicals that have a natural affinity for hormone regulation. The oil's bioactive compounds, including cineole and linalool, work to balance the body's hormonal equilibrium, alleviating symptoms such as hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings associated with perimenopause and menopause. Additionally, monk's pepper essential oils has been shown to stimulate blood flow and reduce inflammation, further supporting women's overall health and well-being during this transformative period.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Monk's Pepper essential oil helps combat oxidative stress and inflammation associated with menopause, which can contribute to hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings.

Hormone-regulating properties: The oil's phytoestrogen content helps balance estrogen levels, alleviating symptoms such as hot flashes, vaginal dryness, and mood changes, which are common during menopause.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Monk's Pepper essential oil's anti-inflammatory compounds can help reduce joint pain and stiffness, which many women experience during menopause due to hormonal changes.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, roots are used to create a soothing and calming oil that helps alleviate hot flashes and night sweats.
Seeds: Containing potent antioxidants and anti-inflammatory agents, seeds are used to create an oil that supports hormonal balance and reduces symptoms of menopause.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of dried cnidium monnieri roots, stems, and leaves for distillation purposes.
Combine the harvested plant material with 1000ml of distilled water in a stainless steel distillation apparatus.
Steam distill the mixture at atmospheric pressure for 2 hours and 30 minutes to extract essential oils.
Collect and filter the resulting essential oil through activated charcoal and cotton pads to remove impurities.
Store the filtered essential oil in dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids, away from direct sunlight, at a temperature between 15°c to 25°c for up to 12 months.

Antioxidant: Oat essential oil is rich in antioxidants, which can help protect against oxidative stress and cellular damage caused by hormonal fluctuations during menopause, promoting overall health and well-being.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh oats avena sativa leaves and flowers in the morning when dew is present.
Dry the plant material using air circulation or shade drying for at least 24 hours.
Steam distill 100g of dried oats avena sativa material using 500ml of water for 30 minutes.
Filter the essential oil using paper filter or cotton cloth and discard the sediment.
Store the obtained essential oil in a dark glass bottle with tight lid at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree essential oils helps with menopause because they possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance. The oil's ability to calm nervous tension and reduce anxiety can bring relief from hot flashes and mood swings, while its estrogen-balancing effects help regulate vaginal dryness and discomfort. remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: The essential oil of Adiantum giganteum has anti-inflammatory properties that may help alleviate hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings commonly associated with menopause.

remedy_recipe: Harvest dried ginkgo biloba leaves from a reputable source in a clean environment.
Combine 10 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves with 100 milliliters of carrier oil such as sweet almond or grapeseed oil.
Allow the mixture to steep for 24 hours at room temperature before shaking and refrigerating overnight.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass bottle, discarding solids after 2 weeks.
Store the herbal ginkgo biloba essential oil in an amber glass bottle in a cool dark place for up to 6 months.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat menopause with herbal essential oils is by using a blend of Clary Sage, Lavender, and Geranium. These oils work synergistically to alleviate hot flashes, mood swings, and sleep disturbances commonly associated with menopause. Regular use can also help alleviate symptoms like night sweats, vaginal dryness, and joint pain.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to menopause that are treated with herbal essential oils are perimenopause symptoms, menstrual cramps, and premenstrual syndrome (PMS). Clary sage oil, for example, has been shown to ease hot flashes and night sweats, while lavender oil can help alleviate anxiety and insomnia. Peppermint oil is also used to reduce menstrual cramp pain and discomfort, and geranium oil may help regulate hormonal imbalances that contribute to PMS symptoms.
